self_introduction: Hi, I'm Vishwa Jaganathan from Salem, Tamil Nadu. I completed my B.E. in Mechatronics Engineering at Paavai Engineering College with a CGPA of 8.0. Alongside academics, I pursued Full Stack Development through NxtWave CCBP Academy. I have built multiple AI-powered and full-stack applications including DEVA AI, SecureChat, AstroXI, and Mahabharata Chronicles. My strength is treating challenges as deadlines rather than stress, which helps me stay focused and deliver results. I am currently seeking opportunities in AI Development and Full Stack Development.
